message:
fix(permissions): stabilize JSON serialization order for deterministic diffs

Sort extension IDs alphabetically and capabilities within each extension
alphabetically before serializing to permissions.json. This eliminates
non-deterministic ordering from HashMap iteration that could cause
spurious diffs when the file is re-saved without any logical changes.

The new test `save_serializes_extensions_and_capabilities_stably` verifies
that extensions (ext-a before ext-b) and capabilities (exec before http)
appear in sorted order regardless of insertion order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
